surface_styles.glowing_card: bg-[#1E1E1E] border border-[#2563EB]/30 hover:border-[#2563EB] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(37,99,235,0.15)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(37,99,235,0.35)] transition-all duration-300

animations.cursor: custom global cursor with blue dot and outer ring
animations.particles: tsparticles or framer-motion floating blur blobs

cartoon_character_logo.description: Cartoon character logo provided by user. Use in Hero and About sections.

hero_background.description: Sleek abstract art with curved dark blue and black patterns.

designer_photo.description: Man in black shirt sitting in front of computer, useful for About section if needed.

portfolio_item_1.description: Silver iMac desk setup for website mockups.

portfolio_item_2.description: Color code book for branding mockups.

elements: Hover zoom and overlay with 'View Project'
Middle 'Most Popular' with glow badge and prominent scaling

special_instructions: Ensure complete RTL layout support when Arabic is selected. Store preference in localStorage.
No placeholder text. All buttons MUST work live.
Incorporate data-testid attributes on interactive elements.
Use framer-motion for page load animations and scroll reveals.
Use react-fast-marquee for the Trusted By section.
Contact form must simulate saving to DB or work visually.
All social/WhatsApp buttons must link to the specified WhatsApp (+973 3374 0941) or social media handles (Instagram @daniyaldesignerofficial, Facebook Daniyal Designer Official).
